Four Seasons Hotel Cairo at Nile Plaza

5.0 star property
Luxury hotel with 5 restaurants, near Tahrir Square

Photo gallery for Four Seasons Hotel Cairo at Nile Plaza

  • Overview
  • Rooms
  • Location
  • Policies
Located in Downtown Cairo, Four Seasons Hotel Cairo at Nile Plaza offers a luxurious oasis with shopping on site and a poolside bar. Unwind with Turkish baths, cabanas by the outdoor pools or indulge in 5-star dining at one of the 5 restaurants. Guests rave about the helpful staff.

Why we love this property

Spa serenity
Indulge in deep-tissue massages, aromatherapy, and body treatments at the spa. Unwind in the sauna, steam room, and Turkish bath after a workout.
Luxury city living
Savour a meal at the pool-view restaurant in this luxury hotel with curated furnishings. The city centre location offers a stylish urban retreat.
Culinary wonderland
5 restaurants, 3 bars, and a cafe offer diverse dining options. Chinese cuisine tempts taste buds while buffet breakfast energises morning adventures.

About this property

Four Seasons Hotel Cairo at Nile Plaza

Four Seasons Hotel Cairo at Nile Plaza puts you a short five-minute drive from Tahrir Square and Egyptian Museum. Guests can indulge in deep-tissue massages, aromatherapy or reflexology, and Bella, one of 5 restaurants, serves lunch and dinner. Other highlights at this luxurious hotel include 2 outdoor pools, an indoor pool and a poolside bar. Fellow travellers love the helpful staff. Public transportation is only a short walk: Sayyeda Zeinab Station is 14 minutes and Sadat Station is 15 minutes.

At a glance

Hotel size

    • 365 rooms
    • Arranged over 30 floors

Arriving/Leaving

    • Check-in start time: 3 PM; check-in end time: 3 AM
    • Contactless check-in and check-out are available
    • Express check-in/out available
    • Late check-in subject to availability
    • Minimum check-in age – 18
    • Check-out time is noon
    • Contactless check-out

Special check-in instructions

    • This property offers transfers from the train station (surcharges may apply); to arrange pick-up, guests must contact the property 24 hours prior to arrival, using the contact information on the booking confirmation
    • Front desk staff will greet guests on arrival at the property
    • Information provided by the property may be translated using automated translation tools

Required at check-in

    • Credit card, debit card or cash deposit required for incidental charges
    • Government-issued photo ID may be required
    • Minimum check-in age is 18

Children

    • Babysitting*

Pets

    • Pets stay for free (up to 7 kg per pet)
    • Food and water bowls available

Internet

    • Free WiFi in public areas
    • Free Wi-Fi in rooms (speed: 25+ Mbps)

Parking

    • Covered on-site self-parking (USD 16 per day)
    • Covered on-site valet parking (USD 16 per day)
    • Wheelchair-accessible parking on site

Transfers

    • Airport shuttle (available 24 hours)*
    • Train station shuttle*

Other information

    • Designated smoking areas

Special features

Spa

Guests can pamper themselves by indulging in the on-site spa services. There are 14 treatment rooms including rooms for couples. Services include deep-tissue massages, hot stone massages, sports massages and Swedish massages. The spa is equipped with Turkish bath/hammam. A variety of treatment therapies are provided, including aromatherapy and reflexology.

Dining

Bella – This restaurant serves lunch and dinner.
Eight Restaurant – This restaurant specialises in Chinese cuisine and serves brunch and dinner. A children's menu is available. Reservations are required. Open daily.
Upper Deck Lounge – Overlooking the pool, this restaurant serves lunch and dinner. A children's menu is available. Open daily.
Pool Grill Restaurant – Overlooking the pool, this restaurant specialises in seafood and serves breakfast, lunch and dinner. A children's menu is available. Open daily.
Zitouni Restaurant – This restaurant serves breakfast, brunch, lunch and dinner. A children's menu is available. Open 24 hours. Open daily.

Fees & policies

Optional extras

  • Buffet breakfast is offered for an extra charge of approximately USD 31 per person
  • Airport shuttle service is offered for an extra charge of USD 110 per vehicle (return)
  • Train station pick-up and train station drop-off services are offered for an extra charge

Children & extra beds

  • In-room babysitting is available for an extra charge

Parking

  • Covered self-parking costs USD 16 per day
  • Covered valet parking costs USD 16 per day

Pool, spa, & gym (if applicable)

  • Reservations are required for massage services and spa treatments and can be made by contacting the property before arrival at the number on the booking confirmation

Policies

This property has outdoor spaces, such as balconies, patios and terraces, which may not be suitable for children. If you have any concerns, we recommend contacting the property prior to your arrival to confirm that they can accommodate you in a suitable room.
Only registered guests are allowed in the guestrooms.
Guests can rest easy knowing that there's a carbon monoxide detector, a fire extinguisher, a smoke detector, a security system, a first aid kit and window guards on-site.
This property accepts credit cards, debit cards and cash.
Credit cards accepted: Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Diners Club, JCB International, Eurocard
Cashless transactions are available.
This property affirms that it follows the cleaning and disinfection practices of Lead with Care (Four Seasons).

Frequently asked questions

Does Four Seasons Hotel Cairo at Nile Plaza offer free cancellation for a full refund?

Yes, Four Seasons Hotel Cairo at Nile Plaza does have fully refundable room rates available to book on our site. If you’ve booked a fully refundable room rate, this can be cancelled up to a few days before check-in, depending on the property's cancellation policy. Just make sure that you check this property's cancellation policy for the exact terms and conditions.

Is there a pool at Four Seasons Hotel Cairo at Nile Plaza?

Yes, there are 2 outdoor pools, an indoor pool and a children's pool.

Are pets allowed at Four Seasons Hotel Cairo at Nile Plaza?

Yes, pets stay for free, with a maximum weight of 7 kg per pet. Food and water bowls are available.

Is parking offered on site at Four Seasons Hotel Cairo at Nile Plaza?

Yes. Self-parking costs USD 16 per day. Valet parking costs USD 16 per day.

Is an airport shuttle service offered by Four Seasons Hotel Cairo at Nile Plaza?

Yes, an airport shuttle is available. The charge is USD 110 per vehicle return.

What are the check-in and check-out times at Four Seasons Hotel Cairo at Nile Plaza?

Check-in start time: 3 PM; check-in end time: 3 AM. Check-out time is noon. Express check-in and check-out and contactless social distancing and check-out are available.

What is there to do at Four Seasons Hotel Cairo at Nile Plaza and nearby?

Four Seasons Hotel Cairo at Nile Plaza has 2 outdoor pools and 3 bars, as well as a 24-hour fitness centre and a sauna.

Are there restaurants at or near Four Seasons Hotel Cairo at Nile Plaza?

Yes, there are 5 on-site restaurants, featuring Chinese cuisine and pool views.

Does Four Seasons Hotel Cairo at Nile Plaza have rooms with private hot tubs?

Yes, each room has a deep-soaking bath.

What's the area around Four Seasons Hotel Cairo at Nile Plaza like?

Four Seasons Hotel Cairo at Nile Plaza is in Downtown Cairo, a short 15-minute walk from Tahrir Square and 15 minutes' walk from American University of Cairo.

Response from Yves Giacometti on 24 Mar 2026
Dear Bheeshma, Thank you for your kind feedback. I’m delighted to hear that you enjoyed our family‑friendly atmosphere and felt comfortable during your stay. I’m sorry the weather didn’t allow you to enjoy the pool and outdoor areas this time. We hope to welcome you back again soon so you can experience them fully on a sunnier visit. Kind regards, Yves Giacometti Regional Vice President and General Manager Four Seasons Hotel Cairo at Nile Plaza
